Roadmap

Embarking on a new journey to reach our full potential

Phase One Q1 2024

The Beginning of Everything

Our journey starts here, from scratch, in a constant search for innovation in the Blockchain and AI field. During this period, we will begin the development and lay the foundations of the project by creating something unique, something that can be useful in everyone's daily life. Don't miss a step, and follow us to celebrate every milestone together!

✅

Project Conceptualization

✅

Team Formation (Dev/Mod/Helper)

✅

Issue & Solutions Plan

✅

Creation of MindAI - ChatBot

✅

Integration of Cryptomus Payment Method (Decentralized)

✅

Implementation of Blockchain ChatBOT Mode

✅

Incorporation of New Ambassadors

✅

KYC & Audit Verification with Freshcoins.io

✅

Launch on Uniswap

Phase Two Q2 2024

Satellite Preparation

We continue to grow at an excellent pace, bringing the long-awaited innovation to the blockchain and AI fields. In this quarter, we will work on implementing many features that can make our main utility even more powerful.

✅

Implementation of 14 International Languages on ChatBot

✅

Staking dApp Launch

✅

New Partnership

✅

Listing on CoinmarketCap & Coingecko.

✅

TAO Bittensor Integration

✅

Education and Training of the Community

✅

Presentation of Revenue Share Program

✅

On-chain Data

✅

Gemini AI Integration

✅

Web Application

✅

5000 $MDAI Holders

Phase Three Q2 2024

Control Tower

At MindAI, we have a precise plan: to achieve mass adoption of our utility, and we will achieve it through various centralized implementations and by attracting an audience outside the crypto community into our ecosystem through the influence of certain individuals.

✅

New Ambassadors for the promotion of $MDAI (Youtube,Telegram,Twitter,Tiktok)

✅

Adding new Plugins for managing financial news and what's related to it, strategies and statistics of the highest business

🟠

Integration of FIAT Payments to Pay for Subscription/Tokens

✅

Integration of Audits on ERC20/BEP20/SOL

✅

White Label Program

🟠

CEX Listings (Bybit, Bitget and Kucoin)

🟠

Premium subscriptions can be paid with $MDAI, tokens will be burned or injected into staking as a reward, at your choice

🟠

Mixer Implementation on MindAI Bot

Phase Four Q3 2024

Exploration of new lands

As our journey continues to discover new additions and new sources of information for our holders, we will create a new beginning to the apprehension of what has always been deemed useless.

🟠

Web2(Google & Personal Mail) Integration

🟠

Google/Facebook/Twitter ADs

🟠

Community Involvement

🟠

Opening of an information source on the Crypto Market with AI

🟠

Integration into Flooz's Telegram Bot and Web App, to purchase MindAI with FIAT currency

🟠

Integration of a Contract to remove all access to one's wallet(dApp,smart contract of purchased tokens...)

🟠

New Ambassadors to structure customer trust

🟠

Integration Wallet Tracking + Dashboard of own owned tokens.

🟠

Interface that will detect the creation of new tokens, according to some parameters analyzed in real time by AI for filtering safe tokens(Initially for ETH, then SOL & Base)

Phase Five Q4 2024

The End that will determine a new beginning

In the last quarter of the year, the team will focus on forming Partnerships with large venture capital firms and begin development of a new utility that will change things for all blockchain investors.

🟠

Website V2 development.

🟠

Creation of a decentralized chat in the WebApp.

🟠

Integration of AI models for voice content generation.

🟠

Hiring of new developers within the team.

🟠

Partnerships with Google Cloud, AWS, Microsoft & NVIDIA.

🟠

Partnerships with other startups outside the AI-based crypto world

🟠

Marketing of the platform through Billboard in NYC

🟠

Integration of AI models for the creation of Music

🟠

BubbleMaps integration

🟠

Frequent AMAs in space outside of our PodCast

🟠

Beginning development of a SniperBot

Testimonials

  • 0xHopli

    Solidity Developer

    The fusion of AI and Blockchain is something spectacular. I used the coding prompt and found it very helpful for a function I couldn't grasp, especially for newcomers, it could be a step forward in learning innovation.

  • Manuel Fuesta

    Psychologist

    MindAI's psychological counseling component is really well developed. It pays special attention to the words used in the conversation, understands and helps you in a perfect way.

  • PaulWhoo

    Regular User

    MindAI has been helpful for me to understand aspects of the financial world that I had never seen before. AI innovation must be accepted by now, and I think this bot will soon become part of the market.

  • Ethan K.

    Horror Writer

    I'm usually against AI, as it could take away our hard work as writers, but it gave me excellent inputs and helped to start a new hypothetical book. There are still improvements to be made, but not bad for now.

  • Emma

    Tinder User

    At first, I was very skeptical that a bot could help me create my Tinder account to be more "acceptable", but it did and it made me very happy. Now I just have to hope to meet someone hahaha!

  • James Williamsma

    UI Developer

    I'm not very comfortable with this new AI technology, but I have to admit, I used MindAI to solve a problem on a website I was building for a client. After days of searching online, I decided to try this AI and what can I say, I immediately solved the problem.

  • Nate Byte

    CODEX CEO

    I love the innovation that AI is bringing to the world of blockchain, especially MindAI with its 70+ prompts. Mass adoption is imminent.

  • Koodor

    Photoshop & Illustrator Designer

    I personally tested the new DALL-3 technology on MindAI's bot with a direct Illustrator prompt. It met my expectations, which I thought were worse.

  • Mark Landon

    AI Journalist

    As a journalist who mainly covers innovations in the field of AI, i have never seen something quite like what this team has developed on Telegram before. Very useful and with an interface understandable to everyone.

  • Patrick.eth

    Crypto Marketer

    This bot could be the future of marketing. Seriously, it gave me many alternatives on how I could make a crypto product adaptable to a broad market of ads and more. I recommend you try it. It learns more and more every day.

  • 0xHopli

    Solidity Developer

    The fusion of AI and Blockchain is something spectacular. I used the coding prompt and found it very helpful for a function I couldn't grasp, especially for newcomers, it could be a step forward in learning innovation.

    MindAI's psychological counseling component is really well developed. It pays special attention to the words used in the conversation, understands and helps you in a perfect way.
